steps.title: Use the clause after the semicolon
steps.content: The sentence explains the blank directly: people will never be able to answer the question about how the paintings were understood. The missing word must mean that the question cannot be settled.

steps.title: Reject the other descriptions
steps.content: Choice B would mean the question contradicts itself, but the problem is lack of an answer. Choice C means urgent or essential, which the sentence does not say. Choice D means impossible to avoid, not impossible to resolve. The answer is A.
